burden.mortalityRate: Indirect; fracture and head injury burden

vulnerablePopulations: older adults with diabetes and neuropathy
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical fall risk assessment (history, gait/balance), orthostatic vitals, vision check, medication review

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: tens of millions of older adults at risk
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; limited access to physiotherapy and home modification

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Often recognized after fracture; limited geriatric assessment services
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Exercise, nutrition, medication review, vision correction, and home safety counseling
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited rehab access and delayed fracture care in some regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Community-based exercise and family support can reduce risk when mobilized
